name: @reddb-io/toon
description: TOON v3.3 parser and serializer, plus TOONL v0.2 append-only streaming. Dependency-free ESM, conformant against the official spec corpus.

scripts.test: node --test test/toon.test.mjs test/toonl.test.mjs test/conformance.test.mjs test/json-limits.test.mjs test/wire-efficiency.test.mjs test/readme-examples.test.mjs test/helpers.test.mjs
